path: PNGS/Syeda is the Leader of Ladies of Paradise.png
text: Onoe Fatima came walking and her gait resembled the gait of the Prophet () . The Prophet () said, "Weloome, O my daughter!” Then he made her it on his right or on his left side, and then he told her a secret and she started woeping. | asked her, "Why are you weeping?" He again told her seoret and she started laughing. | said, *I never saw happiness so near to sadness as | saw today " | asked her what the Prophet () had told her. She said, *| would never disclose the seret of Allah's Messenger (#)." When the Prophet (#) died, | asked her about it. She replied. “The Prophet () said: “Every year Gabriel used to revise the Qur'an with me once only, but this year he has done so twice. | think this portends my death, and you will be the first of my family to follow me." So | started weeping. Then he said. ‘Don't you like to be the chief of all the ladies of Paradise or the chief of the believing women? So | laughed for that * Pra— ; Sahih al-Bukhari 3623, 3624
